name: Honey Buttermilk Bread (Radis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the mixing bowl.
2. Activate the machine and enjoy.
NOTE: We use Saco buttermilk powder and adjust the water accordingly.
ROLLS: These are one of our favorite rolls. Let the machine do the work through the MANUAL method (or DOUGH cycle). Then knead again, adding some flour if the dough is sticky. Shape into rolls and allow to rise until doubled in bulk. I usually do this on top of the dryer when it is in use. Bake at 375°F until lightly browned. Sometimes we use an egg wash and sprinkle with sesame or caraway seeds.
